questions.subject: fractions
questions.text: A Fraction Phantom is half invisible. What fraction is that?

questions.subject: fractions
questions.text: You used 1 out of 4 tower slots. What fraction of slots are used?

questions.subject: fractions
questions.text: The Freezer slows enemies to 2/5 of their speed. What fraction of speed is lost?

questions.subject: fractions
questions.text: You completed 6 out of 8 waves. Simplify that fraction.

questions.subject: fractions
questions.text: Your tower's accuracy is 1/3, and an upgrade adds 1/6 more. What is the new accuracy?

questions.subject: fractions
questions.text: An enemy is 3/4 through the path. It retreats 1/8 of the path. How far along is it now?

questions.subject: fractions
questions.text: The Shatter bonus triples damage on frozen enemies. If base damage is 2/3 of max, what fraction of max damage does Shatter deal?

questions.subject: fractions
questions.text: A Phantom flickers for 2/5 of each second. In 15 seconds, how many total seconds is it invisible?

questions.subject: fractions
questions.text: Tower A hits 3/4 of the time. Tower B hits 2/3 of the time. What is the product of their hit rates?

questions.subject: fractions
questions.text: A Golem splits at 1/2 HP into 2 fragments. Each fragment has 1/5 of the original HP. What fraction of total HP do both fragments represent?

questions.subject: fractions
questions.text: Your freeze slows enemies by 2/5. An upgrade boosts the slow by 1/4 of the current amount. What is the new slow factor?

questions.subject: fractions
questions.text: Wave 7 sends enemies at 3/4 the usual interval. If normal interval is 2/3 seconds, what is the new interval?
